# terrible_community_general_matrix (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `hs_url` (String) URL of the homeserver, where the CS-API is reachable.
- `msg_html` (String) HTML form of the message to send to matrix.
- `msg_plain` (String) Plain text form of the message to send to matrix, usually markdown.
- `room_id` (String) ID of the room to send the notification to.

### Optional

- `password` (String) The password to log in with.
- `token` (String) Authentication token for the API call. If provided, `user_id` and `password` are not required.
- `user_id` (String) The user ID of the user.
